posts.title: Democracy: what we are missing
posts.body: This debate got emotional, yet the data points still matter. On democracy, the current argument in my feed ignores at least one important constraint. If implementation capacity stays weak, promises will not survive budget season. My position is not ideological purity; it is about outcomes people can verify.

posts.title: Diplomacy: questions worth asking
posts.body: People are reacting fast, but the institutional details are where outcomes are decided. On diplomacy, the current argument in my feed ignores at least one important constraint. External pressure changed the timeline, but not the structural constraints. Vote and explain your choice in replies, especially if you think all options are flawed.

posts.title: Elections: a practical path forward
posts.body: This debate got emotional, yet the data points still matter. On elections, the current argument in my feed ignores at least one important constraint. Leaders cannot claim urgency while postponing the accountability part.
